papers.title: See Tomorrow, Act Today: Foresight-Driven Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Bozhou Zhang, Nan Song, Yuang Wang, et al.
papers.summary: 提出前瞻式自动驾驶规划框架，先通过世界模型想象未来场景再做决策，从反应式转为前瞻式范式

papers.title: GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba
papers.authors: Yang Wu, Zhaojiang Liu, Qiang Meng, et al.
papers.summary: 首个利用Deformable Mamba的LiDAR世界模型，解决点云无序性和动静态分离挑战

papers.title: Frozen LLMs as Map-Aware Spatio-Temporal Reasoners for Vehicle Trajectory Prediction
papers.authors: Yanjiao Liu, Jiawei Liu, Xun Gong, Zifei Nie
papers.summary: 利用frozen LLM作为推理引擎进行轨迹预测，结合HD map语义信息

papers.title: VLM-VPI: A Vision-Language Reasoning Framework for Improving Automated Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions
papers.authors: Qingwen Pu, Kun Xie, Yuxiang Liu
papers.summary: 利用Qwen3-VL+GPT-OSS实现行人意图理解与年龄感知的差异化刹车控制

papers.title: Reasoning About Traversability: Language-Guided Off-Road 3D Trajectory Planning
papers.summary: 语言引导的越野轨迹规划，通过action-aligned标注和地形感知优化实现单图3D轨迹推断

papers.title: SimPB++: Simultaneously Detecting 2D and 3D Objects from Multiple Cameras
papers.authors: Yingqi Tang, Zhaotie Meng, Erkang Cheng, Haibin Ling
papers.summary: 统一2D透视和3D BEV检测的端到端模型，支持混合监督

papers.title: An End-to-End Decision-Aware Multi-Scale Attention-Based Model for Explainable Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Maryam Sadat Hosseini Azad, et al.
papers.summary: 多尺度注意力模型实现可解释的自动驾驶决策，提出Joint F1评估指标

papers.title: Learning to Identify Out-of-Distribution Objects for 3D LiDAR Anomaly Segmentation
papers.authors: Simone Mosco, Daniel Fusaro, Alberto Pretto
papers.summary: 3D LiDAR异常分割，通过特征空间分布建模检测未知物体

papers.title: ParkingScenes: A Structured Dataset for End-to-End Autonomous Parking in Simulation Scenes
papers.authors: Haonan Chen, Kaiwen Xiao, Bin Tian, Jun Fu
papers.summary: 基于CARLA的结构化自动泊车数据集，包含704个episode和约105K帧
